title: TheCrib pack
body:
**INFO:** This modpack aims to maintain the original Minecraft experience while also providing optimization, quality of life and a bit of ✨spark✨.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f02ecc72245094bb0ab4d6ea44ff38b53ce79b.png)

Its made for a friendsgroup server but feel free to try it yourself!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f02ecc72245094bb0ab4d6ea44ff38b53ce79b.png)


**HOW TO INSTALL:**
1. Download the Modrinth app
2. Search for TheCrib pack and click install
3. Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!
